title: phagnalon saxatile subsp. rupestre
intro: Phagnalon saxatile subsp. rupestre, also known as a plant species within the Phagnalon saxatile complex, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Phagnalon saxatile subsp. rupestre is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its uses and preparation methods may vary depending on the region and cultural traditions.
